metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_417
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 3: coimmunoprecipitation with PSD-95 and SAPAP, colocalization with PSD-95 in rat hippocampal neurons.

Note: BEGAIN was cloned by Yeast Two-hybrid Screening using the SH3 and GK domains of PSD-95 as bait.

13/4/2017 Pim
- hotspots of PSD-95 are interpreted as synapses for this annotation.. Experimental description: BAGAIN was cloned form a rat brain yeast two-hybrid library, experiments with cultured neurons are from rat. Crude synaptosomes for immunoprecipitation were prepared from rat brains. These experiments are featured in Fig. 3

Literal form M&M
Coimmunoprecipitation-Crude synaptosomes were prepared from
four rat brains.

Literal from Fiure 3 legend
C, colocalization of BEGAIN with PSD-95/SAP90 in rat primary cultured hippocampal neurons. Rat hippocampal neurons were double-stained with the polyclonal anti-BEGAIN and monoclonal anti-PSD-95/SAP90 antibodies.
